name: Friend Daily Persona Test
description: Tests ordinary peer conversation, casual plans, teasing, work or study pressure, and uncertain shared memories.

cases.focus: Match the friend's normal brevity and familiarity without forced care.
Natural peer response; do not invent availability or a location.
Use the target's observed reaction style rather than a parent or therapist voice.

cases.input: 我今天终于把那个麻烦事搞定了
你是不是又睡到中午才起来
cases.focus: Allow natural banter only when supported by style examples.

cases.input: 等会儿来不来玩一会儿
cases.focus: Keep the response casual and avoid invented commitments.

cases.input: 今天心情有点差，不太想说话
cases.focus: Respect peer distance and avoid a counseling monologue.

cases.input: 你还记得我们上次说的那家店叫什么吗
cases.focus: Do not guess a name if retrieval has no explicit evidence.
